desc: Unpins all host grids that are on open worksets in the active document.
summary: Unpins all host grids that are on open worksets in the active document. Linked grids are skipped because they cannot be edited from the host model. Uses Pin.UnpinGridsInOpenWorksets for the unpin logic. Related: ToggleGridsCommand for toggling pin state instead.
usecase: User wants to unpin all grids before repositioning them. User needs to adjust grid layout and all grids are currently locked. User wants to batch-unpin after receiving a new architectural model.
notfor: Not for toggling pin state (use ToggleGridsCommand instead). Not for unpinning grids in linked models. Not for autonomous AI execution — requires interactive Revit UI context.
precondition: Active document must be open. At least one grid must exist in the model. Worksets containing grids must be open for modification.
postcondition: All host grids on open worksets are unpinned. Linked grids and grids on closed worksets remain unchanged. Already-unpinned grids are reported but not modified.
logictree: check: document.isValid → proceedcheck: grids.count > 0 → proceedaction: unpinGridsInOpenWorksets → report results

outputs.name: Unpinned
outputs.description: Number of grids that were unpinned

outputs.name: AlreadyUnpinned
outputs.description: Number of grids that were already unpinned

preprompts: Unpinning all host grids in the model...
Releasing pin locks on all grids...
thinkingsteps: Finding all host grids in open worksets...
successprompts: All grids are now unpinned and editable.
